theme: cross the ridge to reach the lower valley
title: Canyon Rewrite: Expand Before You Can Collapse
strategies: do nothing: submit zero moves (reproduces the checker's own do-nothing baseline)

single-step hill-climbing: repeatedly apply whichever legal move improves the running cost most right now, stop when no move helps (never expands, since every expand rule here is individually cost-increasing, so it can never reach the collapses that only exist after an expand)

two-move opportunity reformulation: score every legal 'expand-then-collapse' pair as one atomic combo by its net benefit (even though the first half raises cost), rank all 1-move and 2-move opportunities by benefit-per-move, and apply them greedily within the budget
exhaustive/backtracking search over move sequences (infeasible at the larger scales; illustrates why the reformulation above is needed rather than brute force)
